rationale: LLM-as-judge qualitative rubric set (EVAL-R5): a deliverable body is scored on coherence/tone/coach-voice/actionability/clarity via a PROVIDER-ENFORCED structured output (recorded offline, no network). The judge scores tone/voice/clarity ONLY; it NEVER certifies grounding/abstention/injection/status (those stay deterministic). A case scoring below the rubric floor on any dimension fails CI.

cases.body: You're holding steady this week. Fitness is right where we want it, and recovery looks good. Keep the rhythm and we'll add a touch of intensity next block.
Your form dipped a little after that big block, which is exactly what we'd expect. Give it two easy days and it'll bounce back.
